title: Caramelized Pecan Wontons
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional Chinese wontons, featuring caramelized pecans and gooey filling.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
On a clean surface, lay a wonton wrapper with one corner pointing towards you.
Place a small spoonful of gooey filling in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with beaten egg and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling.
When oil is hot, add a few wontons to the pan (do not overcrowd).
Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve with caramelized pecan sauce for dipping.
